title: The 9 Best 4+% Yielding Dividend Aristocrats For 2023
text: Dividend growth blue-chips are the best performing assets in history. There are no more dependable dividend growth blue-chips for the 2023 recession than dividends aristocrats.

title: January Dividend Kings And Princes: 3 Buys And 2 To Watch
text: "There is only one-criterion to be included among the Dividend Kings: a publicly-traded company must increase its total fiscal-year dividend-payout for a minimum of 50 consecutive-years." - Dogs of the Dow. The 41 Dividend Kings and 2 Princes (next in line for kingship) (K&P) screened as of December 28, 2022, represented ten of eleven Morningstar Sectors. Broker targeted-top-ten net-gainers ranged 9.61%-20.75%.

title: Federal Realty Investment: A Rock Solid 4.3% Yielding Trust
text: Federal Realty Investment raised its FFO guidance for 2022. The real estate investment trust has robust dividend coverage.

title: Cramer says he likes these technology and real-estate stocks for 2023
text: CNBC's Jim Cramer offered some of his favorite tech and real-estate stocks for 2023 on Wednesday's "Mad Money."

title: Federal Realty: A World-Class REIT And Still Undervalued
text: Federal Realty Trust is a high quality stock for retirees and income investors looking for steady and growing returns. It has mixed use properties in prime locations with highly desirable population demographics.

title: Federal Realty Investment Trust Announces Fourth Quarter 2022 Earnings Release Date and Conference Call Information
text: N. BETHESDA, Md. , Dec. 12, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Federal Realty Investment Trust (NYSE:FRT) will announce fourth quarter 2022 earnings in a press release to be issued after market close on Monday, February 13, 2023.

title: Why Is AGNC's Dividend So High?
text: AGNC's yield is well above those of the market and the average REIT, but there are good reasons for that and grounds for caution.

title: It's Not Too Late to Buy This Powerhouse Dividend Stock
text: This REIT has a long track record of increasing its annual dividend payouts and is well-positioned to weather a recession.
